title: DIAL-A-RIDE AND ADA PARATRANSIT - 211info
text: JOSEPHINE COMMUNITY TRANSIT DIAL-A-RIDE AND ADA PARATRANSIT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides door-to-door transportation for individuals unable to use the local fixed route service, which includes ADA Paratransit. Available to approved clients who have completed and passed the application process. 300 NW 5th Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Age 62 and older and adults with disabilities Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Rides: Monday-Friday 6:30am-7pm Email (541) 474-5452 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 474-5452 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for applications and more information. Call to schedule a ride a minimum 24 hours in advance. FEES: $2.00 per one way ride for scheduled rides $4.00 per one way ride for unscheduled same day rides or changes DOCUMENTS: For paratransit eligibility: Professional Verification sheet included with paratransit application AREA SERVED: City of Grants Pass Services: Disability Related Transportation Other Services Offered At This Location: TRANSPORTATION - COMMUTER BUS SERVICES TRANSPORTATION - FIXED ROUTE AND TRANSIT ON DEMAND BUS SERVICE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JOSEPHINE COMMUNITY TRANSIT
